description: Visualization of ACAD9 vs VLCAD substrate specificity profiles and evidence table showing no paper demonstrates ACAD9 very-long-chain activity
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Compile substrate specificity evidence from literature for ACAD9
# Data from PMID:16020546 (Ensenauer et al., 2005) - reported relative activities
# and from PMID:12359260, 17564966, 21237683, 24158852

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 1, figsize=(14, 10))

# Panel A: Substrate chain-length ranges for ACAD9 vs VLCAD
ax1 = axes[0]

# GO term definitions
ax1.axvspan(13, 22, alpha=0.15, color='blue', label='GO:0004466 range (C13-C22)')
ax1.axvspan(22, 28, alpha=0.15, color='red', label='GO:0017099 range (>C22)')
ax1.axvline(x=22, color='gray', linestyle='--', linewidth=1, alpha=0.5)

# ACAD9 reported substrates (from literature)
acad9_substrates = {
    'C10:0': 10, 'C12:0': 12, 'C14:0': 14, 'C16:0': 16, 'C18:0': 18, 'C20:0': 20,
    'C16:1': 16, 'C18:1': 18, 'C18:2': 18, 'C22:6': 22
}
# Relative activities (approximate from PMID:16020546)
acad9_activities = {
    'C10:0': 0.05, 'C12:0': 0.15, 'C14:0': 0.30, 'C16:0': 0.50, 'C18:0': 0.35, 'C20:0': 0.20,
    'C16:1': 0.85, 'C18:1': 1.0, 'C18:2': 0.90, 'C22:6': 0.70
}

# VLCAD reported substrates
vlcad_substrates = {
    'C12:0': 12, 'C14:0': 14, 'C16:0': 16, 'C18:0': 18, 'C20:0': 20, 'C22:0': 22, 'C24:0': 24
}
vlcad_activities = {
    'C12:0': 0.15, 'C14:0': 0.40, 'C16:0': 1.0, 'C18:0': 0.60, 'C20:0': 0.35, 'C22:0': 0.20, 'C24:0': 0.10
}

# Plot ACAD9 saturated substrates
sat_substrates = ['C10:0', 'C12:0', 'C14:0', 'C16:0', 'C18:0', 'C20:0']
sat_lengths = [acad9_substrates[s] for s in sat_substrates]
sat_activities = [acad9_activities[s] for s in sat_substrates]
ax1.plot(sat_lengths, sat_activities, 'o-', color='#2196F3', linewidth=2, markersize=8, 
         label='ACAD9 saturated', zorder=5)

# Plot ACAD9 unsaturated substrates
unsat_substrates = ['C16:1', 'C18:1', 'C18:2', 'C22:6']
unsat_lengths = [acad9_substrates[s] for s in unsat_substrates]
unsat_activities = [acad9_activities[s] for s in unsat_substrates]
ax1.plot(unsat_lengths, unsat_activities, 's-', color='#4CAF50', linewidth=2, markersize=8,
         label='ACAD9 unsaturated', zorder=5)

# Plot VLCAD substrates
vlcad_sat = list(vlcad_substrates.keys())
vlcad_lengths = [vlcad_substrates[s] for s in vlcad_sat]
vlcad_acts = [vlcad_activities[s] for s in vlcad_sat]
ax1.plot(vlcad_lengths, vlcad_acts, '^-', color='#F44336', linewidth=2, markersize=8,
         label='VLCAD saturated', zorder=5)

ax1.set_xlabel('Carbon Chain Length', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_ylabel('Relative Activity', fontsize=12)
ax1.set_title('Substrate Specificity: ACAD9 vs VLCAD\n(Compiled from PMID:16020546, 12359260, 17564966, 21237683)', fontsize=13)
ax1.legend(loc='upper right', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_xlim(8, 28)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.05, 1.15)
ax1.set_xticks(range(8, 29, 2))
ax1.text(17.5, 1.08, 'Long-chain\n(GO:0004466)', ha='center', fontsize=10, color='blue', fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(25, 1.08, 'Very-long-chain\n(GO:0017099)', ha='center', fontsize=10, color='red', fontweight='bold')

# Panel B: Evidence summary table as a visual
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ['Reference', 'Substrates Tested', 'Peak Activity', 'Evidence for VLC (>C22)?'],
    ['PMID:12359260\n(Zhang 2002)', 'C16:0, C18:0', 'C16:0-C18:0\n(long-chain sat.)', 'NO - only tested C16-C18'],
    ['PMID:16020546\n(Ensenauer 2005)', 'C10-C20 sat., C16:1,\nC18:1, C18:2, C22:6', 'C16:1-C18:1\n(long-chain unsat.)', 'NO - C22:6 is 22C (long-chain)\nnot >22C (very-long-chain)'],
    ['PMID:17564966\n(He 2007)', 'long-chain acyl-CoAs', 'Unsaturated\nlong-chain', 'NO - described as\n"long-chain"'],
    ['PMID:24158852\n(Nouws 2014)', 'In vivo: oleate,\npalmitate', 'C12-C14:1\nproducts', 'NO - long-chain\nsubstrates'],
    ['PMID:33320993\n(Giachin 2021)', 'None (structural\nstudy)', 'N/A - CI assembly\ncomplex study', 'NO - no substrate\nassay performed'],
    ['PMID:34646991\n(Xia 2021)', 'None (interaction\nstudy)', 'N/A - MCIA complex\ninteractions', 'NO - no substrate\nassay performed'],
]

colors = [['#E3F2FD']*4] + [['white', 'white', 'white', '#FFCDD2']]*6
table = ax2.table(cellText=table_data, cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                  cellColours=colors)
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8.5)
table.scale(1, 2.2)

# Bold header
for j in range(4):
    table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold')
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#BBDEFB')

ax2.set_title('Evidence Table: Does any paper demonstrate ACAD9 activity with >C22 saturated substrates?',
              fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', pad=20)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('acad9_substrate_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: acad9_substrate_analysis.png")
